extra.reason: Fixed: claude profile ReadyPattern '>' -> 'Remote Control active' (matches the --remote-control footer present in both default and HTTP launch paths; '>' never matched v2.x glyph '❯'). Verified live: handshake now reaches idle, not failed. Regression test added in profile_test.go.

Fixed: added screen-quiescence working->idle transition to health monitor (quiescentIdle + idleQuiescence, per-session runState). Guarded by WorkingIndicator so a busy-but-quiet agent is not falsely idled; added WorkingIndicator 'esc to interrupt' to claude profile (codex already had 'Working'). Verified live on both agents incl. a 25s silent task that correctly stayed 'working'. Unit tests added in health/monitor_test.go.

Implemented /session/capture + /session/send HTTP shims over daemon Capture/SendPrompt; 6 handler tests pass; docs/http-api.md updated.

Added internal/project registry (projects.toml, slug->repo_cwd+plan_globs) + /sessions?project= filter (cwd-under-repo OR owner_id tag); nil-safe daemon load; unknown project -> empty. 7 tests pass; docs updated.

Added /babysit/new (mint project-scoped context: panes+repo_cwd+plan_refs+server, bbolt-persisted, TTL) and /babysit/context (resolve, lazy expiry). Distinct ?context= token. store bucket+methods + 5 daemon tests pass; docs updated.

Added optional config http_auth_token + withAuth middleware: loopback always open, non-loopback requires Bearer (constant-time compare), 401 otherwise; disabled when empty. 2 tests (table + 401) pass; docs Authentication section added.

B keystone complete: B1 capture/send shims, B2 project registry+filter, B3 babysit context mint/lookup (bbolt+TTL), B4 server-side bearer auth. Full arcmux suite green; docs/http-api.md updated. A (voxtop relay) is now unblocked.
voxtop babysit mode shipped: MODES[babysit] + babysit_tools (pane/plan/beads tools), two-phase confirm gate, ?context= handoff in main.py. 9 tests + 25 relay regression tests pass.

Web prototype built in ~/Projects/voice-controlled-pm (index.html/app.js/serve.sh): mic->WS->relay, audio playback, tool/transcript feed. JS syntax-checked, serves 200. Full voice loop validation needs live voxtop server+xAI key+mic (manual).

Multi-server implemented: ServerEntry model + savedServers in VoxDefaults, AppState add/remove/select + migration seed, SettingsView picker+add. serverHost stays the active-host accessor. CODE COMPLETE; needs macOS xcodegen+build to verify (no Swift toolchain on Linux).

iOS push+tray+deep-link+connect code complete: BabysitInvite/Store, BabysitAppDelegate (APNs reg+token+routing), vox://babysit handling, ConverseService ?context= + babysit mode, ConverseView/MainTabView routing, BabysitTrayView, Settings entry, Info.plist/entitlements. Plists validated. Needs macOS build + APNs key/provisioning + arcmux push sender (operational).

Babysitter voice mode shipped end-to-end: B (arcmux subsystem, go tests green), A (voxtop relay mode + two-phase confirm gate, 84 server tests green), A.5 (web prototype built). C (iOS multi-server) and D (iOS push/tray/connect) code-complete pending macOS Xcode build + APNs provisioning + arcmux push sender.

Babysit session live on voxtop (worker vox-worker, context minted, deep link+QR delivered) AND the server-side handoff is now headlessly verified + regression-tested. Remaining iOS-UI leg tracked as voxtop-nq8 for the Mac runner.
Updated the HTTP daemon Codex remote command constant and matching singleton-detection tests from 'cdx remote-server' to 'cdx remote-control'; verified with go test ./internal/daemon.

Shipped: internal/profile.Class registry (codex/claude/grok × interactive tmux + headless exec) with DefaultProfiles derived from classes; grok interactive profile (ready/trust/working patterns verified live) + grok_exec driver (streaming-json parser w/ resume via sessionId); hook install + env seeding + loader wrapping now keyed by profile.HookType/HookBacked() — no agent-name conditionals; grok hooks fully auto-registered via drop-in ~/.grok/hooks/arcmux-session.json; generic hook script parses both claude and grok payload dialects and attributes via ARCMUX_HOOK_AGENT; per-session grok leader socket (session_start_args) fixes hooks running in env-less shared leader (verified: leader exits with session); ListAgents gRPC + arcmux-cli agents + arcmux-cli exec (class resolution, --keep/--session resume, --json, --timeout); docs/llm-classes.md + docs/state-dir.md subscriber contract; skill updated. Verified: make validate green; unit tests for classes/parsers/installers/script dialects; live e2e scripts/e2e/hooks-judge-live.sh grok PASS (prompt_submit+turn_end in ~/data state, prompt_ingested gated); live exec smoke returned grok output. Residual: judge_source may report heuristic when screen evidence wins the first-poll race (hooks evidence still recorded); claude/codex hook registration remains manual (arcmux-kxv/arcmux-urc).

Claude arcmux-session-hook.sh now registered in ~/.claude/settings.json (blueprint template claude/settings.json + live; blin-agents 2edaf9d) on UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop with test -f guard. Repeatable e2e existed (scripts/e2e/hooks-judge-live.sh / make validate-e2e-hooks); ran live post-registration: PASS with prompt_ingested judge_source=hooks confidence=0.97 and session-state prompt_submit evidence. In-daemon auto-registration remains tracked as arcmux-urc.

Implemented HTTP Codex remote-server launch via cdx remote-server, tagged remote_server/current_command state in create/list responses, guarded Codex remote-server as a live singleton, and close now kills the tmux session when available. Verified go test ./internal/daemon -run 'TestAgentStartCommand|TestIsCodexRemoteServerSnapshot' and git diff --check; go test ./... only fails unrelated internal/config TestDeliveryDefaults path expectation.

Shipped d16a076: defaults moved to ~/data/mux/{sessions,hook-output}; coded idempotent startup migration (tested, verified live — daemon log shows migrated docs and all profiles on the new dir); docs/state-dir.md reframed as the mux protocol contract with ~/data/arcmux explicitly excluded as app-private; validate.md + skill updated; mission-control ticket re-pointed.

Epic complete: judges split (judge_typesafe.go/judge_hooks.go, 77d70a7), hooks judge reads protocol state ~/data/mux/sessions (d16a076), config [delivery].judge selects, default now auto-cascade hooks→typesafe→heuristic (0a6961b), live e2e green for claude+grok (judge_source=hooks 0.97).

PR #1 merged (9e28ca0); generic session-aware hook + /tmp/arcmux env handoff shipped and since extended (grok dialect, ARCMUX_HOOK_AGENT). Post-merge live verification satisfied by repeated live runs 2026-06-09: daemon restarts on new binary, generic hook fires via env handoff (judge_source=hooks e2e), no per-session scripts regenerated, legacy sweep coded in CleanupLegacyScripts.

Added opt-in [hooks].auto_register (default false) and daemon-start RMW registration for Claude settings.json and Codex hooks.json; tests cover fresh files, existing-hook/key preservation, idempotent reruns, malformed JSON refusal, /Users/blin duplicate detection, and daemon opt-in wiring; make validate overall: pass.

Fixed: generated session names now use the full id suffix (agent + id[2:], matching the HTTP path) so rapid same-agent creates can no longer collide into the idempotency dedupe. Regression test TestCreateSessionGeneratedNamesNeverCollide proves two same-owner empty-name creates yield two distinct sessions (created=true twice). make validate pass. CLI --name passthrough deferred (workaround no longer needed).
